title: NUPTIO Tea Light Candle Holders - Set of 24 Amber Glass Pumpkin Tealight Holder Ribbed Votive Bulk Christmas Halloween Decorations Wedding Party Living Room Table Centrepieces
features: 【Special Pumpkin Design】The multipack glass candle holder is designed with the shape of a pumpkin, and the cute little pumpkin lamp could add more fun to holiday decorations. when you light a candle in the t light holders, the light will refract through its unique vertical stripes in a super pattern all around.

【Multi-Purpose & Creative】You can paint scary grimace pattern on the pumpkin lamps or you can hang them up on a string! Not only for holidays such as Christmas, Halloween, Thanksgiving, Mother's Day, and Easter, but also for DIY and homemade candles.

【Multiple Colour】We provide several colors for you to choose, you can choose the perfect one you want. Whether you are holding an intimate gathering, setting up a romantic dinner, or planning a elegant event, these votive candle holders are perfect for creating a warm and charming ambience.

【Dimension】Set of 24 tea light holders, each measuring 5.3cm/2.1" in height and 6.3cm/2.5" in diameter, opening diameter is 4.4cm/1.7'', perfect for 3.8cm/1.5" diameter standard tealight candles, small votive candles, and flameless candles (Candles not included).

【Safe Packaging】The tea candle holders are packaged in thick foam to minimize breakage during transportation. We stand behind our products and offer customer satisfaction to ensure that you are happy with your purchase.
